Metadata.title: SYSTEMA.WORKS | Web, Apps, Automation, AI, SMM
Metadata.description: We design and build websites, web apps, mobile apps, automation, and AI assistants for growing businesses.

Landing.eyebrow: Web • Apps • iOS/Android • Automation • AI • SMM
Landing.title: We build digital products that bring in inquiries, streamline operations, and drive revenue.
Landing.subtitle: From fast landing pages to full web and mobile products, we handle strategy, design, development, and launch in one team.
Landing.trust: Clear milestones, honest communication, four languages, measurable results.
Landing.stat2: Localization from day one to support new markets
Landing.stat3: strategy, design, development, and launch under one accountable team
Landing.servicesIntro: End-to-end: discovery, design, development, integrations, launch, and iteration.
Landing.service1Body: High-performance pages with clear messaging, SEO-ready structure and conversion analytics.
Landing.service2Body: Custom dashboards, client portals, marketplaces and internal systems built for scale.
Landing.service3Body: Native and cross-platform apps integrated with backend, CRM and business workflows.
Landing.service4Body: AI assistants, inquiry qualification, messenger workflows and campaigns aligned with your sales process.
Landing.techBody: We design for speed, reliability, and easy maintenance — so you can grow without rewrites.
Landing.caseTitle: monte.guide: from idea to a steady flow of inquiries
Landing.caseBody: monte.guide is a real product we build and improve. It shows how UX, engineering, and localization can turn a directory into a reliable inquiry channel.
Landing.caseNarrative: Users find the right service faster, and businesses get better-qualified inquiries.
Landing.monteIntro: A service discovery platform for Montenegro that combines web experience, messenger entry points, and a scalable architecture.
Landing.monteFeature1Body: Users can search in natural language and open results directly in a smooth Mini App flow.
Landing.monteFeature2Body: Content and search adapt to language so users understand offers instantly.
Landing.monteFeature3Body: Users save useful cards, compare providers and return without losing context.
Landing.monteFeature4Body: Businesses claim profiles, update information and manage their visibility.
Landing.monteFeature5Body: Relevant search and media-rich cards improve trust and conversion.
Landing.monteFeature6Body: One product: website, installable PWA, and Telegram entry points.
Landing.processIntro: Clear process, short iterations, predictable checkpoints.
Landing.step1Body: We define business goals, target audience and success metrics.
Landing.step2Body: We design UX, technical structure and integrations.
Landing.step3Body: We ship in short iterations with testing and analytics in place.
Landing.step4Body: We improve conversion, automate routine work, and keep iterating.
Landing.whyBody: You get one accountable team for product, engineering, and launch support.
Landing.why1Body: Every feature is tied to a business objective, not just technical delivery.
Landing.why2Body: We design UI/UX and architecture together from day one.
Landing.why3Body: We build systems that stay maintainable and scalable after launch.
Landing.aiTitle: AI chat that turns an inquiry into a clear brief
Landing.aiBody: The assistant asks a few questions about your goal, timeline, budget range, and contact — then prepares a brief for a manager.
Landing.aiPreviewUser: Need a landing page and chatbot handoff in 2 weeks.
Landing.aiPreviewAssistant: Got it. I’ll confirm deliverables, timeline, budget range, and contact — then pass a concise brief to a manager.
Landing.aiStep1Body: Asks focused questions about your goal, expected result and what should be delivered first.
Landing.aiStep2Body: Captures timeline, budget range and one contact so the request can move without delays.
Landing.aiStep3Body: Builds a structured brief, marks priority and routes urgent requests for fast follow-up.
Landing.aiPoint1: Focused on practical work: development, automation, AI features, SMM, and UI/UX.
Landing.aiPoint2: Anti-bot checks, server-side validation, and response QA at every step.
Landing.aiPoint3: Inquiries and chat history are available for admin review in one place.
Landing.contactBody: Share your goal, timeline, and a contact. We’ll reply with a plan and next steps.
Landing.contactTrust: Reply within 24 hours • English / Srpski / Russian / Ukrainian
Landing.legal: By using the AI chat, you agree that we may process your inquiry data for initial project assessment and follow-up.

Chat.title: SYSTEMA • Chat consultation
Chat.hello: Hi! Describe what you need — I’ll ask a few questions and prepare a brief for the team.
Chat.startError: Unable to start session now. Please try again.
Chat.replyError: I could not process this message. Please try again.
Chat.cooldownLabel: Your next message will be available in {time}.
Chat.lowCostMode: Your request is already in progress. Clarifications left: {count}.

login.title: Admin Sign In
login.subtitle: Use your pre-approved admin email. User creation is disabled.
login.magicSent: Magic link sent. Open your email and continue.

actions.cleanupUnknownOpenConfirm: Close all Unknown and Open web chat sessions? This cannot be undone for status changes.
actions.cleanupUnknownOpenDeleteConfirm: Owner only: permanently delete these sessions and related records? Press Cancel to perform close-only cleanup.
actions.cleanupUnknownOpenDone: Cleanup complete ({mode}). Affected: {affected} / matched: {matched}, open: {open}, unknown: {unknown}.
actions.forceMergeConfirm: Force merge links customers irreversibly. Continue?
actions.linkHint: Approve/reject for standard candidate link flow.
actions.forceMergeHint: Use Force merge only after manual verification. Owner role recommended.
actions.routingHint: Moves lead to handoff. Normal is standard mode, expedite is priority mode.
actions.identityHint: Approve and Force merge merge current customer into Pending candidate. Reject cancels pending match.
actions.outcomeHint: Closes lead as won or lost and stores the outcome event.
actions.selectLeadToAct: Select a lead in pipeline to open actions.
actions.identityPendingOnly: Identity actions are available only for Pending candidate state.
actions.identityReady: Pending candidate detected: identity actions are available.
actions.forceMergeOwnerOnly: Force merge is available only for owner role.

outcomes.title: Won/Lost Leads
outcomes.subtitle: Closed outcomes timeline for sales reporting
outcomes.empty: No won/lost leads for selected filters.
